ad.title: Don't drive after drinking
ad.description: Book a safe ride in one tap. Penalty ranges appear right after this ad.
ad.item1: Quick call Grab, Xanh SM, Gojek, or a sober buddy
ad.item2: Review Decree 100 fine ranges before heading home
ad.item3: Put safety first for you and your loved ones
ad.note: Safety reminder ad — you can skip anytime.

warning.title: Safety warning
warning.description: Never drive after drinking. Call a ride or ask a friend.

fines.title: Decree 100 penalties
fines.description: Reference fine ranges for alcohol when driving.
fines.disclaimer: For reference only — not legal advice.

ride.title: Quick ride
ride.hint: Tap to log a ride and open the provider app when available.

history.title: Ride history
history.emptyHint: Request a ride from Safe Ride to build history.
